commit.subject: LU-17692 tests: add version check for interop
commit.message:
LU-17692 tests: add version check for interop

Replace the interop check with a version code.

Signed-off-by: Yang Sheng <ys@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I25573a0d191bd90d6f0c5d8e394d47f1a0066047
